name: Hungarian Pan Fried Pork Steak
recipeIngredient: Salt and Freshly Ground Pepper - to taste
4 tbsp Freshly Rendered Lard or Peanut Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: The paprika gravy recipe is among this collection.
2. Debone the pork steaks and pound them to 1/8 inch thickness.
3. Rub both sides of the meat with the celery seeds.
4. Place the flour in a large bowl and season with salt and pepper.
5. Dredge the pork in the seasoned flour.
6. Pan fry in the lard or peanut oil over medium heat until golden brown on both sides.
7. Serve with paprika gravy.
